name: Chicken, Mushroom and Artichoke Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Fresh tarragon (or 1/4 teaspoon Dried tarragon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and pat the chicken dry. Season with salt, pepper, and paprika.
2. Brown the chicken in 1 tablespoon butter in a large frying pan.
3. Transfer the browned chicken to a crockpot.
4. Pour the chicken broth and sherry into the pan. Stir to loosen any brown bits.
5. Pour over the chicken.
6. Season with tarragon, cover, and cook on low for 8 hours.
7. Just before serving, sauté the mushrooms in the remaining butter until glazed.
8. Mix the cornstarch with an equal amount of cold water to form a slurry.
9. Turn the crockpot to high heat.
10. When the sauce is simmering, stir in the cornstarch mixture.
11. Cook until thickened, then add the sautéed mushrooms and artichoke hearts.
12. Heat everything together and serve.
